name: Spicy Almonds
recipeIngredient: 2 scallions, sliced into thin rings, white and light green parts kept separate from dark greens
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the almonds and cook for 2 minutes, tossing frequently, until they are light brown and smelling toasty.
3. Reduce the heat to low.
4. Drizzle oil over the nuts and toss well.
5. Sprinkle soy sauce and lime juice over the nuts and toss well.
6. Sprinkle cayenne pepper, black pepper, garlic, and scallion white/light green parts separately over the nuts and toss very well.
7. Continue to cook, stirring and tossing frequently, for 5 minutes or until the nuts are dry and the scallion and garlic are soft.
8. Add the scallion greens and toss again.
9. Serve over poached bass or snapper with a wedge of lime.
Yield: 4 servings
